_comment: Authoritative squire-server model roster (schema v2). Single source of truth. Read by vllm-switch-web.py to build MODE_UNIT / VALID_MODE / the switch HTML, and served (minus 'unit') at GET :4090/models. Also shipped to clients as the offline fallback at ~/.config/local-llm/server-models.json. Edit here (repo) then redeploy via the installer. TWO layers: (a) 'modes' = the vLLM switch UNITS (one served model at a time on the 24GB 4090); fields per mode: mode (switch id + /switch payload), key (mode number for the switch web page + flat fallback), label, task (one-line role), model_id (id clients address it by, == vLLM served id / 'active-model' alias), ctx (served context window), max_output (output token cap), max_prompt (copilot prompt-token cap = ctx - max_output - margin), unit (systemd unit, server-only, withheld from clients), imagegen_disabled (crush: disable imagegen-mcp for this mode), default (standing/default mode). (b) 'menu' = the TASK-organized picker shown by the launchers: categories -> rows, each row {key,label,mode} routing a task to a mode (multiple tasks may map to the same mode, e.g. office + coding -> coder). Launchers render menu.categories and resolve a row's 'mode' to that mode's fields; if 'menu' is absent they fall back to a flat list of modes.
